title: Security
twoFactorAuthDesc: TOTP-based 2FA with backup codes for enhanced security
jwtAuthenticationDesc: Token-based authentication for Console API requests
s3SignatureDesc: AWS-compatible signature authentication for S3 API
rateLimitingDesc: IP-based rate limiting ({{count}} login attempts per minute)
accountLockoutDesc: Automatic {{duration}} lockout after {{attempts}} failed login attempts
sessionManagementDesc: Automatic session timeout and idle detection ({{duration}})
rbacDesc: 4 roles: Admin, User, Read-Only, Guest with granular permissions
serverSideEncryptionDesc: AES-256-GCM authenticated encryption for all stored objects (64 KB chunks, tamper-proof)
objectVersioningDesc: Multiple versions with delete markers for data recovery
lifecyclePoliciesDesc: Automated data retention and deletion rules
resourceQuotasDesc: Per-tenant storage limits and usage tracking
advancedLoggingSystemDesc: HTTP output with batching and Syslog integration (TCP/UDP)
comprehensiveAuditLoggingDesc: 20+ event types tracked with automatic retention ({{days}} days)
bucketNotificationsDesc: Real-time HTTP webhooks for S3 events (ObjectCreated, ObjectRemoved)
prometheusMetricsDesc: Real-time metrics export for monitoring and alerting
emailAlertsDesc: Automatic email notifications for disk space alerts and tenant quota warnings
dynamicSettingsDesc: Runtime configuration management without server restarts
complianceReadyDesc: GDPR, SOC 2, HIPAA, ISO 27001, PCI DSS support
auditTrailAccessDesc: Complete logging of authentication and access events
readOnlyAuditModeDesc: Global admins can audit tenant buckets without modification
csvExportDesc: Export audit logs for compliance reporting and analysis
bucketPolicyConditionsDesc: Policy Condition blocks fully evaluated — StringEquals/Like, IpAddress/CIDR, Bool, Arn, Numeric operators; unknown operators fail closed (deny)
publicAccessBlockEnforcementDesc: IgnorePublicAcls and RestrictPublicBuckets flags consulted before ACL evaluation; public access denied regardless of ACL when set
consoleSecurityHeadersDesc: X-Frame-Options, Content-Security-Policy, X-Content-Type-Options, X-XSS-Protection, and Referrer-Policy applied on the console port (8081)
jwtS3AuthDesc: Token-based (JWT) for Console, AWS Signature v2/v4 for S3 API
identityProvidersDesc: Enterprise SSO via LDAP/Active Directory and OAuth2/OIDC (Google, Okta, Keycloak, etc.)
tlsClusterCommDesc: Encrypted inter-node communication with mutual TLS between cluster members
bcryptPasswordDesc: Industry-standard password hashing with per-user salt
maintenanceModeDesc: Read-only lock for all S3 write operations during maintenance windows
tlsClusterReplicationDesc: Mutual TLS between cluster nodes; SSE objects are re-encrypted per destination key
crossRegionReplicationDesc: Secure bucket replication to AWS S3, MinIO with credential encryption
objectLockVersioningDesc: WORM compliance, versioning with delete markers, lifecycle policies
selfReplicationPreventionDesc: Automatic validation to prevent circular replication loops
